title: Assertion fault on valid FTS4 query
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE x USING fts4(y,z);
INSERT INTO x VALUES('aaa bbb ccc ddd', 'bbb ddd aaa ccc');
SELECT * FROM x where y MATCH 'bbb NEAR/6 aaa';
key_bug_features: SELECT with MATCH using FTS4 prefix option
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE x USING fts4(y TEXT, z TEXT);
INSERT INTO x VALUES('aaa bbb ccc ddd', 'bbb ddd aaa ccc');
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE y USING fts4(a TEXT, b TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM x WHERE y MATCH 'bbb NEAR/6 aaa';
